Off Calendar Jan-09-2024 Continued To Feb-27-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Lillian Ng appeared via zoom for Andrea Leung (petitioner).

Ms. Ng stated that she is working on an amended petition and requests a continuance. The matter is continued to February 27, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Visting Judge: Cecilia Castellanos. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Cristobal. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar May-16-2022 Continued To Sep-26-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Lillian Ng, via Zoom, for Andrea Leung, Administrator.

Ms. Ng reports of the death of one of the Beneficiaries who lived in Hong Kong. Ms. Ng advises of requesting an order re an estate from the Hong Kong court, which will take some time to receive, and asks for a continuance. The court queries counsel as to the approximate value of the estate and that if it exceeds $735,000, she will be required to file a petition to increase the current bond. Ms. Ng reports that she will need to confirm the preceding and act accordingly.

The Status on Close of Estate is continued to Sep-26-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204. Ms. Ng is instructed to file either a Petition for Final Distribution or a Petition to Approve Report on Status of Administration before the next calling of this matter. A Status of Bond is set for Jun-06-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Vedica Puri. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Gomez. Not Reported.
